summary: WIN-010 c5 H2 (major) — Meza (2021) citation contradicts WIN-068. EXP-220 swaps Meza et al. (2021, JGR Space Physics, doi:10.1029/2020JA028746) for Kim & Chang (2018, Adv. Space Res. 61:2040–2054) — the verified anchor already used in WIN-068. Triple-count cluster now shares one verified reference. Also closes H4 (Chapman-qualitative advocate prong) automatically. All five c5 issues (ISS-1390/1391/1392/1393/1394) resolved by the single EXP-220 patch. Please integrate and close.
